overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with red hair sitting on a bench in a rainy neon-lit urban plaza. The camera performs a slow 360-degree orbit around the stationary character as they interact with glowing devices, revealing cyberpunk architecture including escalators and Tyger Claws gang graffiti.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with escalator access

agents.ego_description: seated on white concrete bench examining a red handheld device while rain falls around the sheltered area

entered.detail: long white concrete bench where the character is seated
metal and glass escalator leading to upper level of the plaza
distant cyberpunk city buildings with illuminated windows and signage
green-tinted wet tiled ground reflecting ambient city lights

segments.scene_description: The camera begins orbiting around a character seated on a bench in a rain-slicked urban plaza. The environment features an escalator structure to the left and distant city buildings, with the wet pavement reflecting the green ambient lighting of the cyberpunk city.

scene_state.functional_zone: gang graffiti wall with pink neon underpass lighting

events.description: character puts away the red device and pulls out a glowing green object, examining it closely

agents.ego_description: manipulating a glowing green handheld device while seated, illuminated by intense pink neon lights from the underpass

entered.detail: concrete wall with green spray-painted 'TYGER CLAWS' gang graffiti and red heart symbol
intense magenta and pink neon lights illuminating the underpass ceiling and walls
thick industrial metal column supporting the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its orbit, the scene transitions to a graffiti-covered wall bathed in vibrant pink neon light. The character switches to a glowing green device, and the Tyger Claws gang graffiti becomes prominently visible on the wall behind them.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with street access

events.description: pedestrian walks into frame from the left side, passing through the background

agents.ego_description: continuing to examine the green glowing device while occasionally looking up toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the plaza in the background, moving left to right

entered.detail: metal and glass escalator structure returning to view as camera completes orbit
distant city buildings and plaza lights visible again as camera faces outward

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit, returning to the original plaza view with the escalator visible again. The character remains focused on the green device while a pedestrian walks through the distant background, and the lighting returns to the cooler green ambient tones of the city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous 360-degree orbit around a seated character, transitioning from a cool green urban plaza into a vibrant neon-lit alleyway before returning to the original city view. It begins by circling the character on a bench amidst rain-slicked pavement and an escalator structure, where the wet ground reflects the ambient green glow of the surrounding architecture. As the camera continues its rotation, the environment shifts toward a wall bathed in vivid pink neon light, bringing prominent Tyger Claws gang graffiti into focus while the character interacts with a glowing green device. The scene then completes its orbit, gliding back toward the initial plaza view as the lighting returns to cooler green tones. Finally, the camera settles back on the escalator and distant city buildings, capturing a lone pedestrian walking through the background.
